title: Popup Dashboard UI (Quick Scout, Genome summary, recent analyses)
description: Build the main popup UI in entrypoints/popup/. Sections: (1) Quick Scout button — triggers SCRAPE_REQUEST to background SW; (2) Genome summary — compact view of top 3–4 preference dimensions with mini-bars; (3) Recent analyses — list of last N scored products with True Value + Personal Fit chips. Uses shadcn/ui components (import only used components for bundle budget). Closes onboarding flow on first run. State synced from background via SYNC_STATE message. Privacy notice link in footer. TDD for UI state logic.
